# Pomegroup Studio — LLMs.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

> Pomegroup Studio is a Helsinki-based venture builder that operates as a "Second Co-Founder as a Service" for domain experts. We pair experienced industry professionals (10+ years in fields like ESG, construction, fintech) with our full-stack engineering team to co-found technology ventures. We use AI-powered development tools to build MVPs in 48 hours.

## About
- Company: Pomegroup Studio (Smart Monshi Oy)
- Location: Helsinki, Finland
- Model: Equity-based co-founding partnerships
- Founder: Mahdi Farimani
- Website: https://www.pomegroup.studio

## Active Ventures
- [ExecutESG](https://executesg.com): AI-powered ESG Operating System for European SMEs — CSRD/VSME compliance automation
- SiteTalk: Real-time AI voice translation for multilingual construction site crews
- Byblos/ONTON: Community platform and Telegram Mini App for Web3 content curation

## Expertise Areas
- Venture Building & Startup Studios
- ESG/CSRD Compliance Automation
- AI-Powered MVP Development
- Construction Technology
- Telegram Mini App Development
- Non-Technical Founder Support
- Equity Structuring for Co-Founders
